title.en: It's a hassle to get into this heritage land, b...

content.en:
It's a hassle to get into this heritage land, but it's easy to get out.

Wow!

Ye Tian came out of this dimension, and then returned to the human race.

This time, from the inheritance place of the lord of the Wumu realm, he obtained the inheritance of the body of the Wumu, the secret method of the three Wutu, the nine Wutu, and the soul vase, no matter which one it is, it is enough to make the fourth realm crazy in the outside world.

And now, all these things belong to him.

In the following days, Ye Tian mainly comprehended the rules of the super-dimension, cultivating the Three Black Secret Methods and the Black Mother's Body.

With the assistance of the multi-dimensional treasure essence, it is not difficult to improve the Wumu body, but for the time being, the cultivation of the Ka Ye wisdom body must be suspended, otherwise the multi-dimensional treasure essence will not be enough.

"Let's take a look at the effect of the Soul Bottle first!"

With the help of the Soul Bottle, Ye Tian placed it in the extradimensional realm in his body, and his soul will and mind were all integrated into the Soul Bottle.

Rumble!!!!

The Soul Treasure Vase released a white light to assist Ye Tian in comprehending the extradimensional rules.

Then.

Ye Tian used the multi-dimensional wisdom light again, and then came to comprehend the Nine Utu, to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

In addition, his other replica bodies also used the Thirteen Blood Lotus to parse the extradimensional rules.

After the superposition of many effects, the efficiency of Ye Tian's comprehension of the transcendent rules reached an incredible level.

"It's so fast, it's as if all extradimensional rules have no secrets!"

Ye Tian was very excited, with such an efficiency, he could definitely quickly improve the extradimensional rules in a short period of time!

But.

He used so many treasures, and each treasure would damage his body and destroy his foundation, causing all of his replica bodies to be destroyed.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, another hundred extradimensional epochs had passed.

This time, he's improved a lot more than the last time.

"Fifty extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian was excited.

In a short period of time, he had raised the extradimensional rules to the fifty realms, and the speed of progress was terrifying.

Moreover, his black mother's body has also ushered in a metamorphosis, from the realm of the first layer to the realm of the first layer of Xiaocheng.

The first layer of the Xiaocheng realm's Wumu body's body has increased its physical strength beyond that of the Kasya's wisdom body.

When the two are stacked, the flesh amplification effect is even more terrifying.

In addition, he also cultivated the Sanwu Secret Method to the first level of Xiaocheng realm, although he could not urge the wisdom body of the Ka Ye and the body of the black mother at will, but at least he could exert seventy or eighty percent of the power, and it would not affect himself.

"My current strength is too strong, it is estimated that I can easily hit the ordinary Fourth Realm, and the combat power is definitely comparable to the powerful Fourth Realm Extradimensional Realm, and I can even escape with my life in the hands of the top Fourth Realm Transcendent Realm!"

Ye Tian estimated.

But even if he is so powerful, he is still very low-key, and he will not provoke those overlord-level extradimensional forces, there is no need for this.

Now that he has so many treasures, he can completely cultivate and after his cultivation breaks through to the fourth realm, he doesn't need to be afraid of other forces in the Five Thousand Territory.

......

The land of the inheritance of the lord of the Wumu realm.

In front of the true picture of Wumu.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon had been contemplating enlightenment, and suddenly burst out laughing on this day.

"Hahahaha, I finally saw the content of the first layer of the black mother's body!!"

He was excited.

Although it took more than two hundred extradimensional eras, he was already very satisfied with being able to see the content of the first layer of the black mother's body.

"Thanks to Ye Tian's guidance, if I were given another thousand extradimensional epoch time, I might not be able to comprehend the map of the black mother and see the content of the first layer of the black mother's body!"

However, now that he has only obtained the content of the first layer of the black mother's body, it is very difficult to completely practice the first layer of the black mother's body.

And once his cultivation fails, his physical body will also be severely damaged.

But he had no choice, he had to train to the first layer of the black mother's body.

"It's not yet time to cultivate the first layer of the black mother's body, you must continue to comprehend until you have thoroughly understood the first layer of the black mother's body, and then go to cultivate the first layer of the black mother's body!"

He was going to spend thousands of extradimensional epochs to attain enlightenment, but he didn't believe in it.

And when the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was still comprehending the first layer of the Black Mother's body, Ye Tian was already improving his strength at a terrifying speed, and he was rapidly increasing his strength every moment.

Gradually, more than two hundred extradimensional epochs passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was excited, because he had finally created a forbidden superdimensional supernatural power that was extremely suitable for him, this superdimensional supernatural power was only suitable for him, and if it was used by other extradimensional realms, it would not be suitable.

This taboo super-dimensional supernatural power can instantly burst out 100% of the power of the whole body, consume the power of the whole body, and form a super-dimensional supernatural power attack.

But this move can be combined with the realm of the black mother, you can quickly recover your strength, you have the power to fight again, you can recover your whole body strength in a short time, and you can use the forbidden super-dimensional magic power again.

This type of extradimensional supernatural power took him hundreds of extradimensional epochs to create, and it was still assisted by the Mind Treasure Bottle, otherwise, it would be difficult for him to create it.

Ye Tian named this superdimensional supernatural power the Black Light Thorn, and the extreme realm was that he could cast three Black Light Thorns, but he could only cast one Black Light Thorn at present.

But even if it is a black light thorn, it can still kill the ordinary fourth realm in an instant, severely damage the powerful fourth realm, and even threaten the top fourth realm.

He also experimented with his other replica bodies, and the strong defense of the black mother's body, plus the wisdom body of the Jiaye, was still unstoppable, and was killed in an instant.

Moreover, this is because his black mother's body has not been promoted to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng, and the secret method of the three black has not been cultivated to the first level of Dacheng realm, otherwise his strength can still be improved (Qian Li's) a lot.

"Maybe I can hunt a fourth-realm existence and use the multi-dimensional treasure bottle to condense the essence of the four realms and multiple cultivations, so that I can easily raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the third realm!"

With this in mind, he began to inquire about the news of the Fourth Realm.

And the fourth realm extradimensional creature alone is undoubtedly the most suitable target.

However, the Fourth Realm itself is extremely rare, and it is naturally not easy to obtain the information of this powerful existence.

In the end, Ye Tian decided to attack the fourth realm among the cultivators.

"Let's attack the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord is the ancestor of the Red Wolf Family, and he once made a move against him.

He honestly traded with the Red Wolf Family, but as a result, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord even wanted to snatch the Duowei Treasure Bottle from him.

Now, his strength has improved, and he naturally wants to take revenge.

Soon, he rushed to the red wolf family.
